params.name: Sleeping Venus
params.description:
On Apr 18, 1510 AD, Giorgione left this painting and passed away with his lover.
The Sleeping Venus, created by Italian painter Giorgione, with the background completed by the painter's disciple Titian. The goddess of beauty in this painting was inspired by a lady whom Giorgione fell in love with at first sight at a party. They quickly fell in love, and the painter used her as a model to begin the creation of this painting. Unfortunately, the woman fell victim to a plague and passed away with …
